newsSection3.description: Stay informed with the latest company news, product updates, and industry announcements from Sazzad.

featured.title: Sazzad Launches AI-Powered Inventory Forecasting Platform
featured.excerpt: Our new AI-powered forecasting tool helps businesses predict demand with 99% accuracy, reducing stockouts and overstock situations while optimizing inventory levels across multiple locations.

news.title: Sazzad Named to Inc. 5000 List of Fastest-Growing Companies
news.excerpt: We're honored to be recognized as one of America's fastest-growing private companies for the second year in a row, ranking #247 with 3-year revenue growth of 1,845%.

news.title: New Integration: Connect Sazzad with Shopify and WooCommerce
news.excerpt: Seamlessly sync your inventory across Shopify and WooCommerce stores with our new native integrations, featuring real-time updates and automated stock management.

news.title: Sazzad Expands European Operations with New London Office
news.excerpt: We're opening a new office in London to better serve our growing customer base across Europe, with plans to hire 50 new employees in the region by year-end.

news.title: Sazzad Named Finalist for Supply Chain Innovation Award 2024
news.excerpt: Our real-time tracking and AI forecasting features have been recognized by the Supply Chain Council as a finalist for the 2024 Innovation Award.

news.title: Customer Success: How ABC Corp Reduced Inventory Costs by 40%
news.excerpt: See how one of our customers transformed their supply chain operations using Sazzad, achieving 40% reduction in carrying costs and 99.5% inventory accuracy.

news.title: Sazzad Announces Strategic Partnership with Global Logistics Provider
news.excerpt: Strategic partnership with DHL to offer integrated shipping and tracking solutions to customers worldwide, enabling end-to-end supply chain visibility.

news.title: Sazzad Releases Q4 2023 Financial Results
news.excerpt: Record revenue growth of 150% year-over-year, driven by strong customer adoption and expansion into new markets.

news.title: Sazzad Appoints New Chief Technology Officer
news.excerpt: Dr. Lisa Wang joins Sazzad as CTO, bringing 20 years of experience in AI and supply chain technology from leading tech companies.
